_doc: Toolkit convention file = PROJECT-SIDE EVIDENCE, never baked into the tool. For projects WITHOUT a spec tree (knife1): narrator (knife4b) reads feature names + route verb hints here; knife4_merge reads optional `risk_keywords` to extend the GENERIC P0 risk dictionary with this project's domain risk words. Spec-bearing projects derive names from spec titles and need none of this.

feature_names.C: 通知服务 (定时确认+推送)
